summary:
FAITH PRACTICES AND NATIONAL LEADERSHIP: Brandon begins by discussing his daily practice of anointing himself, his family, and his surroundings with oil, alongside frequently taking communion, to honor the blood of Jesus. Shifting focus to national matters, Brandon mentions a recent prayer breakfast and President Trump's stated desire to dedicate the nation back to God, potentially during a gathering on May 17th. Brandon notes that Speaker of the House Mike Johnson, a visibly religious figure, is having a positive influence on Trump. Brandon offers prayers for Trump's protection, wisdom, and humility, positioning him as a necessary leader for the nation's spiritual direction.

ECONOMIC TURBULENCE AND WEALTH TRANSFER: Brandon addresses the current drop in cryptocurrencies, gold, and silver, stating that these events are an early onset of a great financial shaking. Brandon states that global elites and the Illuminati are intentionally manipulating the economy and the dollar to sink the financial system prematurely. Believing that one percent of the church will participate in an end-time wealth transfer, Brandon urges his listeners to contend in prayer against this manipulation. Brandon specifically names entities like BlackRock, JP Morgan, and foreign governments as part of this financial maneuvering. Brandon recounts a vision of gold, silver, and Bitcoin moving down rapids in front of major banks, indicating turbulent financial times ahead in 2026. In this vision, Brandon observes a figure brokering an agreement that brings traditional banking and cryptocurrency together.

PERSONAL ANECDOTE AND AUTHENTICITY: Brandon shares a story about his 21-year-old daughter, Megan, who historically struggled with getting her hair cut. Following a prompt from his wife, Diana, the family took Megan to a salon where she peacefully received her first professional styling. Brandon connects this event to the concept of trusting God through difficult valleys to reach a breakthrough. Brandon also discusses conversations between Diana and God regarding Artificial Intelligence and its potential to discredit future miracles. Brandon notes that God remains secure and does not require human validation. Brandon emphasizes the importance of individuality within ministry, rejecting the idea of imitating figures like Billy Graham and warning against ministers who demand exorbitant fees or act as fortune tellers.

SPIRITUAL WARFARE AND PROPHETIC VISIONS: Brandon details intense spiritual warfare, leading a communion prayer and instructing listeners on how to distinguish God's voice from demonic or familiar spirits through consistent spiritual intimacy. Brandon describes seeing the Antichrist spirit massing on the East Coast and visions of demonic entities resembling Wizard of Oz monkeys spreading dark chemtrails across the United States. Brandon states that ancient demonic codes and spells, linked to Nephilim and reptilian bloodlines, are being processed through AI to open portals. Brandon explicitly identifies President Trump as a temporary roadblock delaying the Agenda 2030 beast system. Additionally, Brandon labels French President Emmanuel Macron as a poster boy for the New World Order and a forerunner to the Antichrist, working alongside the United Nations and World Health Organization.

UPCOMING GLOBAL EVENTS AND INTERCESSION: Brandon calls for targeted corporate prayer over several upcoming cultural and global events, including the Olympics and the Super Bowl. Brandon claims these events are surrounded by Illuminati rituals, occult ceremonies, and dark spells intended to release propaganda and potential black swan events. Brandon prays for the protection of attendees and specifically mentions shielding Kid Rock and Turning Point events from these agendas. Brandon concludes his intercession by praying for the United States Federal Reserve, asking that the correct personnel be placed in leadership positions, and calls for a massive revival and divine reversal across the nation.
rawData: [February 06, 2026]-[So much to pray about today but we have the Victory]-[https://youtu.be/3-PvLM6tblM]-[All right. Well, just let me know when everybody's here. I'm just going to sing a little bit before everybody comes in. Only believe. Only believe. All things are possible. Only believe. Only believe. Only believe. All things are possible when you only believe. Lord, I believe. Lord, I believe. All things are possible. Lord, I believe. Lord, I receive. Lord, I receive. All things are possible. Lord, I receive. Well, good morning family. Thank you for joining us again today. I'm going to just take the time right now and anoint myself with oil. I believe with all my heart in anointing yourself with oil in these last days. You need to do it every single day. I anoint my kids. I anoint my wife. I anoint everything. I walk around with a bottle of oil in my pocket because I just believe in the power of the blood of Jesus. I don't want to make it a religious habit, but I do it because of the relationship of just honoring the blood of Jesus, honoring my covenant. That's why we take communion all the time. We got communion all over the place. And as I was watching some of the prayer breakfast this morning and seeing where we are as a nation and the valley of decision of where President Trump is, we're in that place right now that the Lord showed us. And I didn't realize the prayer breakfast was on the 4th, the day after the 3rd. He came in and he said a lot of things about making this nation one nation under God again. He wanted to do a big prayer thing, which Brayden can show you a clip. There's a prayer breakfast he wants to do like a prayer at the National Mall or whatever on the 17th of May. He wants to dedicate this nation back to God in prayer. And I think that's a great step. I believe we can work with that. From what I have seen coming even today interceding for this nation, the Lord keeps talking about a humbling is coming, a shaking is coming to bring the bride back to his side. And in his speech yesterday, he even talked about the speaker of the house being real religious and he said, "I want to be around him more because I don't know if God would protect me like he would him. So, I want to hang around him more." You can see the clip there if you want to see it. But you know, Mike Johnson is a very religious person and he does not hide it. He'll say to me sometimes at lunch, "Sir, may we pray?" I say, "Excuse me, what happened at lunch?" It's okay with me, but he's a very religious person and he is popular and he's doing an unbelievable job. So, I think God is watching over him. I don't know about me, so I hang around with him because I feel I'm protected a little bit. Sir, we believe that God is protecting you, too. We're praying for you. We're excited that you would be excited to have a day of prayer and that you would show up and pray that you would say, "Hey, we want to make this nation a nation under God again and declare it as the head of the nation." We pray for your protection. We pray for your wisdom in leading the nation, praying for you to be a God-fearing man, a backbone like a crowbar, that you're not full of pride, that you're humble before the Lord, and that God will use you in these last days. I'm excited about what you said today. I'm excited about some of the things. Yeah, I believe as the body of Christ, we need to work with this. We need to back you. Let's pray for him as we see crypto and these things tanking, gold and silver and all these things. I said, "Lord, I need that window." There's certain cryptos that fell really hard over the last couple of days and I thought, Lord, is this a great buying opportunity or is this what I saw about the great financial start? What I heard when I was praying today the Lord said, Braden, it's trying to come on early. It's trying to come on early, what you saw about the great financial shaking and things. It's trying to come on early. You must hold it back in prayer. If you don't contend for what I have for you, this is Satan's wheelhouse, the finances. And as the elite of what I told you, the Illuminati with the mask and all the things that I saw are being exposed and the darkness is being covered. They will do things in retaliation against the economy on purpose. They have the ability to do that by pulling their money out and doing things to try to manipulate the economy, to try to manipulate the dollar, to try to do what they got to do with the power that they have to leverage it with what the devil is telling them to do. And if they can try to sink the ship early, they will do so. So what do we do as the church? We pray. The devil knows the words and they know. He knows they're accurate. He knows what the Lord is saying. He knows what the Lord has planned for his body and I told you 1% of the people, if you're listening, will walk in the end time wealth transfer, 1%, because the others are not listening. They're not walking by his side. And so I see the things happening and people are upset and oh, it looks so bad. It looks like blood is in the streets. But instantaneously, instead of being moved by what I see or what I feel, I have to just go vertical and sit there and go, "Hey God, it's in your hands." I use my authority. We pray and we do everything we can but ultimately I was still singing the song. I know the sorrow and I know it all. I don't know all the words, because whenever I don't know all the words I make them up to him, but he knows what I'm saying. Braden, he knows I just sit there and sing to the Lord. It'll all go away if you just say the word. But even if you don't, you know that one by Mercy Me, that song, "It is well with my soul." Whenever you see all these things happening, it is well, it is well with my soul. I was singing that out in the shower today. And there's something when you realize that no matter how much I know that the word of faith, we believe we have power and life and death is in our tongue. That's what the Bible says. But there's a certain place that you've done all you can do, is stand and stand there. And you don't always see the result of what you're believing for. Sometimes people go home early. Sometimes things happen. But that is where I said, it is well with my soul. Regardless of what I see and what I feel, if it don't always pan out the way you thought it would, I keep my eyes on Jesus and always maintain that place of praise and glory even whenever I don't always see what I wanted to see. Does that make sense what I'm saying to you? There were so many times even with Megan years and years I thought, "Lord, do you see what I'm going through? Do you feel my pain with my little girl and the things that we've walked through?" But yesterday, Diana was in and she said, "Braden, I felt the Lord say to take Megan to get her hair done." I said, and instantaneously I'm thinking, do you remember what happened last time we did that? Back when she was six years old. She's 21 now, next month. And she has never had her hair done. I always trim it to try to keep it out of her face so she doesn't get her she wads it up and gets in huge knots in her hair all the time because she's always touching it and doing things, you know. And I thought, well, I trust that you heard the Lord. But Megan doesn't like it when people put scissors next to her face. She doesn't like the people putting their hands next to her, you know, like most people don't. You know, you put your hand next to my eyes, I'm going to try to freak out and bite you or whatever, you know, but Megan has never been a person who likes that. And so last time we went to the barber, the salon or whatever, I had to hold her arms with the cape around both of us and had that person cutting her hair and Megan was trying to bite them the whole time they were trying to cut her hair. She was screaming at the top of her lungs to the point where we were so embarrassed after we left because the place was full that I vowed I'd never do that again to her. So when Diana said, "You know, Brandon, I heard the Lord today," I said, "Baby, I trust you. Let's do it." So we called the people and we got right in. And as Megan sat there and they washed her hair and got all the knots out because we try so hard to keep her hair—but when you're dealing with somebody that is always doing that stuff, it's very interesting. Unless you live it, you never understand it. As we were going there and all that was happening yesterday, there was such a peace on Megan. She was enjoying it. She was giggling. She was laughing as the people were washing her hair. As she sat there, I sat over to the side this time because both of us couldn't fit in the chair. She sat there and the lady was brushing her hair and combing all the knots out and cleaning her hair up and was cutting and she did the whole hair. And Megan sat there looking at herself in the mirror this time, acting like everything was okay. Yeah, she still put her hands on her ears because the beauticians were loud or whatever, but she got her first style and haircut at 21 years old. It was something that we—as Diana was getting her hair next to her done in Paisley—all my girls got their hair done for the first time together as a family, a girls' day. As you pray and you say, "It is well with my soul." And you go through the sorrow and you don't know the hurt, it'll all go away if you just say the word. But even if you don't—but in that circumstance when you're believing and you get your breakthrough and you have your suddenly, you have your suddenly—the expiration date to the problem. Never forget where you come from. Now that you can see it happen, something that you always longed for, to have your daughter always look nice and to have her hair done right. Never forget where God brought you from. Never forget the valley. I still pinch myself when she's sitting there getting her teeth cleaned like when she got them done this last week. And the dentist looked at her at that time and he looked at her again. He goes, "My goodness, look how far your little girl's come." He's a Christian. He's a believer. And as Megan's getting her teeth X-rayed and doing all that, she didn't even do anything; she just let him clean them. But as I saw her sitting there getting her hair done and they were brushing it up and combing and doing all these things and blow-drying, they thought we were strange because of the way Diana and I both were watching with our mouths open because we were witnessing a miracle. A lot of people will never understand the miracle whenever they see the manifestation around you because they didn't walk in the valley. But when you see God show up after 21 years, you get a breakthrough. I cry because it's something that I've believed for for so long. And yesterday was one of those days you just get through... and the bombardment of the pressure from the world and the things that I've dealt with lately from this channel, praying for our president that I know that God has assigned me to pray for him. And I'm so thankful that there's so many of you that take this prayer channel seriously even whenever I have an off day like we did this last time and the Lord says, "I just want you to show by example." That I don't use the Lord, he uses me. I don't tap into it, he allows me to use it. I have this treasure in earthen vessels that the excellency of the power is known of him and not of me. No matter how much I see or what I don't see, we give all the glory to God. And I know you've heard me say that a thousand times, but you'll hear me say it a thousand more because you saw that it is not random Biggs. I believe some of you are just like whatever. I don't care what you think. But I was so taken these last two days to pray over things and pray over the valley of decision and where President Trump is with the nation and praying over Israel, praying over the finances of the nation because of how serious things are right now. If people didn't realize how much we're on rice paper right now, the escalation of things, the acceleration of things of the end times is all around us. And most people have their head in the sand. They're too busy typing in the chat, "How are you doing, sister clipboard?" And I'm just like, "Do you understand? It's a holy moment." The chat is toxic. There's so many people that lose themselves in just trying to entertain themselves. God is in the still small voice. He's in the moment that is not the shock and awe. He's not insecure. He doesn't need that to validate he is God. He is God regardless. And even with Diana saying, "Lord, are you upset about the AI?" They're going to try to discredit the miracles in the days ahead. People will question whether or not you really did it or not. And he said, "Good." Diana said, "What?" He said, "Good. Blessed are those that have not seen yet still believe." So you're not bothered by AI trying to discredit the miracles that are about to take place, people trying to question him if it's authentic or not. God's not insecure. God does not need to be validated. He's worthy and he deserves all the honor and all the praise of everything we ever do. But God's not looking for you to go, "Hey, I need to know. I need you, Brandon, to validate me to make me feel like I'm God today." He's secure in who he is. He doesn't need me to go, "You know what? The AI disproved you, Lord." I really think he's like, "I don't care about what... I'm God. I'm secure in who I am. I am that I am. Either you believe it or you don't. But I don't care if you do or if you don't. I don't need your validation, Brandon." So many times I think these prophetic channels need to be validated. I've seen and been insecure about it myself, needing them to see that I was right and what the Lord said to me because you want people to—it's like everybody says, "You need to be acid tested, Brandon. You need to be acid tested, your words that you give. You say so much, you need an acid test." So when I have an acid test moment, I try to show everybody because you need that validation from people to let you know, to say, "I heard it. I see. I told you I heard it." But when the Lord said... well, he said to Diana and me both after it was over because I questioned, I sat there looking, "I don't need your validation. I'm confident in who I am." And when Diana said that, I questioned, I went, "Wow, baby. Wow." God is secure in who he is. And when Diana said that, it was beautiful because I realize that there's so much to that statement that he said to her. There's so much to the conversations because Diana thinks on a different level. I think real country backwoods, but Diana is really intellectual and analytical and she thinks real deep and she has these conversations with the Lord that are really humdingers—is what I want to call them. They make you think a lot. And the things that he says to her are so much different than me because all our relationships are so personal. Even her relationship with the Lord is so unique, not cookie cutter. If you're trying to imitate somebody else, you're missing it. You're fearfully and wonderfully made by yourself. You do not need to be a Brandon. You do not need to be a Diana. You just need to be you. So many times I wanted to be like Billy Graham. Boy, if you could give an altar call like Billy Graham, you'd be doing something. Or someone else who was in healing ministry—I won't mention his name now, but I want to be like that. Touch, fire, all this stuff. But the more I get to know certain people, I go, "You know what? I just need to be me." They have issues, and I don't want their issues with their tissues; I just need to be me. I don't dishonor them, and I look at where they've been and what they've achieved for the Lord, but I am fearfully and wonderfully made myself. There are no cookie cutters. There's no parroting. Just be unique and be authentic. As I watched this girl cut Megan's hair yesterday, she was a heavy-set girl and she was so confident in her ability to cut hair. She didn't question if she was too heavy or whatever; she wasn't trying to mimic herself off of somebody else. She was just doing her job and was an artist at what she was doing. I realize there are many times I feel like I don't fit the mold of what I'm supposed to be behind this camera for you. I'm too heavy, I'm not smart enough; there are so many things that try to disqualify me until the Lord showed me, "Just be confident in who you are. I'm working with your weight issues. I'm doing these things for you, Brandon. But there's nobody else who can do what I've called you to do. Just be you." I've just had those "come to Jesus" moments these last couple of days. After the last video, I was so upset about how everything went, and the Lord said, "I did that on purpose. It's not about you and people validating you. It's about them finding me. If your channel goes away, where will they be? Will they find me in a deeper intimacy? I want you to teach them to come to me. They don't need you; they just need me and them." Does that make sense? They need to go vertical. They don't need a relationship with you; they need it with me. Go vertical. And the things He says challenge me, and I sit there and go... He says, "If people look too much at man, I'll show that they're just man. I'll allow them to see how human you really are." So, I'm so thankful that you were able to see it. I fear Him. I fear Him as I hear so much toxicity in ministry nowadays. One minister said, "I won't preach anywhere unless I get $50,000 per time I speak. They have to raise that money before I'll even go there." I'm not mentioning his name. I saw the materialism of the church even more so lately—the big business side. And there is a side of this that is very scary to me. I refuse to be any part of it. I told the Lord, "What is it to gain the whole world and lose his soul?" I've seen that lately with offers and things you get, and you realize, "None of this will change me." None of this will change Diana; none of this will change him. But as He said, "Go back to the main thing all the time. Go back to the janitor. Go back to the way it was here. What got you here in the first place? Don't add to and supplement new things in. Just keep being alone with me." The guy that sits at the dryer and folds laundry, the one that cleans the toilets, the one that takes care of his kids—always keep the main thing the main thing, no matter how big things get around you. I realize it's not just an outward thing; it's a heart thing. There's a lot I see that's been bothering me lately. I've been very annoyed with people coming from Chicago and people coming to church. I go to church to go to church. I'm not there to answer your questions about what you should do to dig in the side of a mountain to find gold, or prophetic words where you're seeking a fortune teller. I'm not a fortune teller. I don't have control over it. But there are so many people—I've looked at the emails and the bombardment of things—you've lost your way. And I am not here to help you find it in that way. "What do I do with my life?" That's for God to tell you. I have no idea. But there are so many people that are so dysfunctional. There's so much dysfunction in the body of Christ. And I'm here to tell you: keep the main thing the main thing. Your dysfunction is a lack of vertical focus. You must keep your eyes on Him. Stop going horizontal. Horizontal is looking at me; horizontal is looking at your pastor. Keep your eyes on Jesus; He's the author and the finisher of our faith. If you keep your eyes on Him, everything else will line up perfectly. Do you understand? And there are so many of you thinking you're listening to the Lord, but you're listening to familiar spirits because you don't get in this book. You're looking through religious, weird eyes, and the things you're meditating on are demonic. You're listening to familiar spirits. I can see them behind your eyes when I'm there. But am I supposed to call you out and lay hands on you, cast the devils out of you right there? So you've got demons? No, because you're going to fight me. You want the devils you have, but I'm not here to pick at you. But I'm not going to allow you to waste my time. My time's precious to me. And there's so much of it lately—people trying to waste your time. Time wasters. Everybody feels they have an entitlement to talk to you. Everybody feels they have an entitlement to say something or whatever, and you go, "You don't have anything for me." I just go back to the little place of my square with my wife and my kids. And it's like Diana said to me: "Isn't it amazing how many people come out of the woodwork after all this? The bigger the channel gets, the bigger the influence, the bigger stuff goes, they come out of the woodwork saying, 'Hey, don't you remember me?'" Do you understand? I think it's interesting because people try to come out of the woodwork and all of a sudden you go, "I just want to go back to the closet and sit there." I don't care about all this stuff. I don't care about all the preaching engagements. I'm just a simple person, but I love having a relationship with Him. So that's what I had for you all today. So let's pray and let's take communion together and let's just seek the Lord for a little bit. Who wants to pray with me and go tubing? I'm so thankful for every single one of you. Isn't Jesus wonderful? So Father, we just thank you for the body that was broken for us. We thank you, Lord, that you died and you rose again on the third day. And we're thankful, Father, that you become life again; that you died, you suffered, you went through all of it so that we don't have to. Lord, we keep the main thing the main thing, keeping you vertical. All this other stuff, God, is just stuff. We take the body and we lift it up before you, God, and we thank you that healing belongs to us. Deliverance belongs to us, and by your stripes, Lord, we're healed. Thank you, Father. Thank you, Father. You were wounded for our transgressions. You were bruised for our iniquities. The chastisement of our peace was upon you, and with your stripes we're healed. And we take this body right now in Jesus' name. Lord, we plead the blood. Lord, we take the blood. We apply the blood and we make much of the blood, and the blood makes much of us. We thank you, Lord, for the blood. We thank you, Lord, that it's never lost its power. That when we confess our sins, you're faithful and just to forgive us of our sins and cleanse us from all unrighteousness. Now, Father, today we enter in by the blood of the Lamb. We come and sit at your throne by the blood and we come up higher by the blood. It's never lost its power. It is never changed—Jesus Christ, the same yesterday, today, and forever. And Lord, we thank you for it right now. We apply the blood of Jesus over us right now and over our sins, over all of it.","corrections":[{"sentence":"Touch, [fur], all this stuff.","originalWord":"fur","proposedWord":"fire","confidence":0.9},{"sentence":"There's no [pariting].","originalWord":"pariting","proposedWord":"parroting","confidence":1.0},{"sentence":"She wasn't trying to [emic] herself off of somebody else.","originalWord":"emic","proposedWord":"mimic","confidence":0.8},{"sentence":"Will they find me in a deeper [intimate]?","originalWord":"intimate","proposedWord":"intimacy","confidence":0.95},{"sentence":"Who wants to pray with me and go [tubing]?","originalWord":"tubing","proposedWord":"YouTube-ing","confidence":0.8}]} And we thank you, Lord. We're so grateful, Father. I plead the blood over anything you want to show me today as a nation. I cover my eyes in the blood; I cover my spiritual eyes. And we thank you, Lord. Satan, we tell you, you are under our feet. We bind you and we take authority over you. We hear the good Lord's voice, and a stranger's voice we won't follow. We don't even recognize your voice because you are so foreign to us. We're so close to the Lord Jesus. We know immediately when a stranger's voice comes in because we're that close to the Father. We're that close to the throne that for any kind of foreign voice, you're going to go, 'That is not my Lord. That is not my Lord. That is the devil, or a demon, or a familiar spirit.' We know exactly who you are and we cast you out in the name of Jesus. We hear the good Lord's voice and He is leading us and He's guiding us in all truth. We're so close to the throne. We're so close to you, Lord, that there is not even a crack for the devil to come in and deceive us. He tries to come in as an angel of light and we go, 'No, your light is darkness.' Even in your greatest time of trying, you have nothing that compares to my God. I plead the blood of Jesus over us and we thank you for the blood right now in Jesus' name. Let's start praying that over us. We recognize the good Lord's voice so much so that even if the devil is trying to mimic it, you're so spiritually in tune, you're so spiritually one with the Father, that even when the devil's trying his best to deceive you, you recognize immediately when the thief comes and you say, 'Get out of here in the name of Jesus.' You don't question it because automatically you're just one with the Father. Our heartbeats are beating together. I'm one with the Lord. His heartbeat is my heartbeat. As He is, so are we in this world. His heartbeat is my heartbeat. His breath is my breath. His voice is my voice. His eyes are my eyes. We think, we move, we have our being in Him. So we don't sit there and question, 'Is this the devil talking?' You know when the devil's talking. You know why? Because it is so foreign. I'm familiar with the Father's voice; I'm not familiar with the devil's. You know what I'm saying? So, instantaneously, when I hear somebody that's not like my Father, I go, 'That's definitely the devil,' because I know my Father. There're so many people going, 'Do you think you're listening to a familiar spirit?' I know that I know, just as much what He doesn't say as when He does. I refuse to sit there and meditate on what the devil sounds like. Why do you take your time out of your day to meditate on the devil's voice? I meditate on the good Lord's voice. And the more I keep in sync with Him and going vertical, I don't have to question whether or not it's the devil's voice because I know in whom I have believed. I know what and whom I am with. I don't question whether it is Diana or Braden. I know my son's voice and I know my wife's voice. I don't go, 'I don't know. I have to think about it. Say something, Braden.' 'Hey, what's up?' I know that's immediately my son right then, right? Do you get that? 'Hey, how are you doing?' 'Hi, Dad. How are you doing?' And I go, 'Is that the devil? Who is that? Is that Bob's voice from down the road?' And you know why? Because I'm familiar with it. So many people question, 'I don't know if that's the good Lord's voice or not. I think that could be a familiar spirit. Are you sure you're hearing?' I know in whom I have believed. I spend time with Him. 'Say something, Braden.' 'How are you doing?' I know his voice. That's Braden. I don't question whether or not that's somebody else's. That's not my brother's son; that's my son. My wife says something to me, I know that's my baby. I know her. Why? I've spent twenty-six years with her, almost since we've been dating. All of it. We've been together a long time. I don't question it at all. Why? Because I have repetition. There ain't no woman that can deceive me from my wife's voice. There're so many people that are always questioning about, 'Are you listening to demonic?' I want to question you: how are you so familiar with the devil's voice that you don't know his voice? How have you become so familiar with the devil that you don't know your Father's voice? You question it. I don't question it at all. Just as much as I'm so confident and I'm listening to my son, I don't question it at all. Do you understand what I'm trying to get across today? There're so many people that spend so much time going horizontal that you become so familiar with the devil's voice that you let him become familiar, but you think you mix them together. There is a great difference in the Father's voice and the devil's voice. There's a great difference. It's insulting for some of you to say the devil sounds like the Lord because you never spend time with Him. It's insulting, not to me but to our Father, because they don't sound anything alike. Truly, even on his highest greatest day, he's nothing like my Father. Everything that he's ever tried to do to be anywhere close to our Father fails by a lot, by billions of miles.
